description: Create @quant/queue package (BullMQ typed wrapper), @quant/storage package (S3/MinIO abstraction), add Redpanda to docker-compose, and create services/cdc-relay/ (outbox poller publishing to Redpanda via KafkaJS)
steps: Create packages/queue/package.json with name @quant/queue, deps: bullmq, ioredis, zod, @quant/common. Scripts: typecheck, test, build (tsc).
Create packages/queue/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json.
Create packages/queue/vitest.config.ts.
Create packages/queue/src/index.ts barrel.

Create packages/queue/src/queue-manager.ts: TypedQueue<TPayload> class wrapping BullMQ Queue. Methods: add(name, payload, opts?), addBulk(jobs), getJob(id), getMetrics(). Typed via Zod schema validation of payloads.
Create packages/queue/src/worker-factory.ts: createWorker<TPayload>(queueName, processor, opts) factory that creates BullMQ Worker with typed processor function, error handling, graceful shutdown.
Create packages/queue/src/job-definitions.ts: Type definitions and Zod schemas for common job types (SendEmail, ProcessMedia, SyncData, GenerateReport, etc.).
Create packages/queue/__tests__/queue-manager.test.ts testing queue add/get with mocked BullMQ.
Create packages/queue/__tests__/worker-factory.test.ts testing worker creation and processor invocation.
Create packages/storage/package.json with name @quant/storage, deps: @aws-sdk/client-s3, @aws-sdk/lib-storage, @aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner, zod, @quant/common. Scripts: typecheck, test, build.
Create packages/storage/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json.
Create packages/storage/vitest.config.ts.
Create packages/storage/src/index.ts barrel.

Create packages/storage/src/storage-client.ts: StorageClient class wrapping S3Client. Constructor accepts config (endpoint, region, credentials, bucket). Methods: upload(key, body, contentType, metadata?), download(key), delete(key), getSignedUrl(key, expiresIn), listObjects(prefix), copy(source, dest), headObject(key).
Create packages/storage/src/storage-config.ts: Zod schema for StorageConfig with defaults pointing to MinIO (localhost:9000, minioadmin/minioadmin).
Create packages/storage/src/multipart-upload.ts: MultipartUploader for large files using @aws-sdk/lib-storage Upload class.
Create packages/storage/__tests__/storage-client.test.ts testing upload/download/delete with mocked S3Client.
Add Redpanda service to docker-compose.dev.yml: image redpandadata/redpanda:latest, ports 9092:9092 (kafka), 8081:8081 (schema-registry), 8082:8082 (rest-proxy). Volume redpanda_data.
Create services/cdc-relay/package.json with name @quant/cdc-relay, deps: kafkajs, @prisma/client, @quant/database, @quant/common, zod, pino. Scripts: start, dev, typecheck, test.
Create services/cdc-relay/tsconfig.json.
Create services/cdc-relay/src/index.ts: entry point that starts the poller.

Create services/cdc-relay/src/outbox-poller.ts: OutboxPoller class that polls OutboxEvent table for unpublished events (publishedAt IS NULL), publishes them to Redpanda topic (outbox.<aggregateType>), marks them as published in a transaction. Uses KafkaJS producer with idempotent: true.
Create services/cdc-relay/src/kafka-producer.ts: Typed Kafka producer wrapper with connection management, disconnect on SIGTERM.
Create services/cdc-relay/__tests__/outbox-poller.test.ts testing poll-publish-mark cycle with mocked Kafka and Prisma.
Run pnpm install.
Run pnpm --filter @quant/queue typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/queue test.
Run pnpm --filter @quant/storage typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/storage test.
Run pnpm --filter @quant/cdc-relay typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/cdc-relay test.
Commit: feat(queue,storage,cdc-relay): add @quant/queue, @quant/storage packages and CDC relay service with Redpanda
acceptance_criteria: packages/queue/package.json exists with name @quant/queue and compiles
packages/storage/package.json exists with name @quant/storage and compiles
services/cdc-relay/package.json exists with name @quant/cdc-relay and compiles
All tests pass for new packages
